away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Chennedy Carter
players.injury_comment: Carter is under the weather and will miss her fourth game this month. With the 27-year-old guard sidelined, Kierstan Bell and Brianna Turner could see increased playing time off the bench. Carter's next opportunity to play will come Wednesday in Phoenix.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans remains without a clear timetable for a return and has yet to make her season debut due to a left leg injury. She can be considered week-to-week until the Aces offer an update on her progress.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Paige Bueckers
players.injury_comment: Bueckers remains probable on the latest injury report for Dallas, so she's trending towards a return from a one-game absence. Aziaha James and JJ Quinerly could see decreased roles if Bueckers gets the green light.

players.name: Paige Bueckers
players.injury_comment: Bueckers remains probable on the latest injury report for Dallas, so she's trending towards a return from a one-game absence. Aziaha James and JJ Quinerly could see decreased roles if Bueckers gets the green light.

players.name: Odyssey Sims
players.injury_comment: Sims exited last Friday's win over the Sparks in a wheelchair and has been ruled out for a third consecutive contest due to a left ankle injury. She is without a clear timetable for a return and can be considered week-to-week until the Wings offer an update on her status.
